title: AI Assistant
welcome: Hi! I'm Bucketeer's AI assistant. Ask me anything about feature flags, experiments, or platform features.

presets.what-are-feature-flags: What are feature flags and how do I use them?
presets.how-to-create-flag: How do I create a new feature flag?
presets.ab-testing: How do I set up an A/B test?
presets.progressive-rollout: How do I use progressive rollout?

sug-ff-001.title: Organize flags with tags
sug-ff-001.description: Tags help organize flags and optimize SDK performance by fetching only needed flags.

sug-ff-002.title: Archive unused flags
sug-ff-002.description: Flags that have been fully rolled out or unused for a long time should be archived to reduce flag debt.

sug-tgt-001.title: Simplify with Segments
sug-tgt-001.description: If you use the same targeting conditions across multiple flags, create a Segment to reuse them.

sug-tgt-002.title: Use Prerequisite Rules
sug-tgt-002.description: Set up dependencies between flags to coordinate feature releases across microservices.

sug-exp-001.title: Set up Goals first
sug-exp-001.description: Define what you want to measure before starting an experiment. Goals track user actions for statistical analysis.

sug-ao-001.title: Try Progressive Rollout
sug-ao-001.description: Gradually increase the percentage of users seeing a feature to minimize risk during deployment.

sug-ao-002.title: Automate with Flag Triggers
sug-ao-002.description: Use webhooks to control flags from CI/CD pipelines or external monitoring systems.

sug-gen-001.title: Explore Bucketeer's features
sug-gen-001.description: Bucketeer offers feature flags, A/B testing, segments, progressive rollout, and more.
